overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character wearing a Santa hat and winter sweater exploring a grand historic library with Gothic architecture. The character moves from a narrow bookshelf corridor into a vast hall with marble floors and towering arched windows, then ascends a wooden spiral staircase.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a magnificent library hall with soaring Gothic arches and tall windows. The character walks past wooden reading tables and display cases, heading toward an ornate spiral staircase visible on the right side of the hall.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the spiral staircase where a woman sits reading in an armchair. The character then begins ascending the wooden staircase with its ornate wrought iron railing, moving toward the upper level of the library.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, dimly lit corridor into a vast, light-filled Gothic library hall and up toward its upper reaches. It begins by following the character through a narrow passage flanked by towering wooden bookshelves and reading desks, moving steadily toward a bright arched opening. As the character passes through the arch, the scene opens into a magnificent hall defined by soaring arches and tall windows, with the camera gliding past wooden tables and display cases. The perspective then shifts toward the right side of the hall, approaching a woman reading in an armchair at the base of an ornate spiral staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the wooden stairs and its wrought iron railing, climbing toward the library's upper level.
